text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho has arrived, and Tokyo
Racecourse is full of people cheering even before
the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Squeee! You can do it, Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Show us your stuff, Tamamo Cross! Crush the
Beast and get yourself another win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Here at today's Tenno Sho, Oguri Cap and
Tamamo Cross will be facing off in an ultimate
showdown for the top.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I knew it was going to be a big event, but seeing
it in person, the crowd's even more fired up than I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, known as the White Lightning,
comes from a poor family. She puts everything on
the track for her family's sake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Her hard work's paid off, and she's won
consecutive graded races with record times. She's
been leaving a huge impact on people and is still
charging ahead with great momentum.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Then there's Oguri Cap, a huge star who started
out in regional races before hurtling onto the
central racing scene like a meteor.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's in her classic year like me, but... To be
honest, she's a lot more popular than I am.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The hype is proof of how extraordinary she's
already proven herself to be in her races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's everything I learned from my
research!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Everyone here is so strong...
choice_data_list: But that doesn't mean you'll lose.
But that doesn't mean you'll lose.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Right. I can't lose.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't let anyone take this race from me. After
all, I said I would run this with all my strength.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have to win this so I'll be a worthy rival to
Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Here I am at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Ogurin, you can do this! This is where your legend
starts!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Show 'em who's boss around here, Tamamo! Give
everyone a taste of that Naniwa spirit!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The spotlight's all on them now—as it should be.
There's no place for me to squeeze in.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know I should leave, but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. Whenever I run with you, it feels like my
own future gets dimmer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. I'd just spoil everyone else's moods
if I hung around. I don't belong in anyone's path.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So is it really all right for me to look forward to a
new future with Chiyo? Is it still okay for me to
dream, even now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dreams of many racers fill the air and mingle
as the autumn Tenno Sho gets underway.
